# proxmox_backup_server_s3_config (Data Source)

Reads a Proxmox Backup Server S3 client configuration via `/config/s3/{id}`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "proxmox_backup_server_s3_config" "example" {
  id = "backup-s3"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID of the S3 client config.

### Read-Only

- `access_key` (String) Access key for the S3 object store.
- `burst_in` (String) Incoming burst limit as a byte size with optional unit.
- `burst_out` (String) Outgoing burst limit as a byte size with optional unit.
- `endpoint` (String) Host name or IP address of the S3 object store, without a protocol scheme or port.
- `fingerprint` (String) X509 certificate fingerprint (SHA256).
- `path_style` (Boolean) Use path style bucket addressing over vhost style.
- `port` (Number) Port to access the S3 object store.
- `provider_quirks` (List of String) Provider-specific feature implementation quirks.
- `put_rate_limit` (Number) Rate limit for PUT requests, in requests per second.
- `rate_in` (String) Incoming rate limit as a byte size with optional unit.
- `rate_out` (String) Outgoing rate limit as a byte size with optional unit.
- `region` (String) Region to access the S3 object store.
